Meta.title: Trattoria Alesa — Italian trattoria in Hochzoll, Augsburg
Meta.description: Warm Italian cooking in Augsburg-Hochzoll: fresh ingredients, family recipes, and the feeling of Nonna’s table.

hero.title: Like at Nonna’s — only here.
hero.subtitle: Slow-cooked sauces, bread that smells like Sunday, and a dining room that feels like home.
hero.mediaAlt: Warm light over a bowl of pasta and fresh ingredients.

intro.lead: At Trattoria Alesa Gelati, every detail is shaped with warmth, tradition, and genuine care.
intro.rest: We cook with fresh, carefully selected ingredients, following recipes passed down through generations. Here in Hochzoll, each dish brings a piece of Italy to Augsburg, creating a place where locals and guests come together, feel welcome, and stay a little longer.

experience.title: Tradition you can taste
experience.body: Our dough rests, our ragù simmers, and our kitchen stays calm. It is not performance — it is care. Pull up a chair, pour some water, and let the room do the rest.
experience.imageAlt: Restaurant dish — colour, texture, and flavour in balance.
experience.imageAlt2: Fresh pasta and kitchen detail — tradition on the plate.
experience.captionLeft: Colour, texture, and flavour — held in quiet balance.
experience.captionRight: Tradition on the plate — warmth in every strand.

highlight.eyebrow: The Table, the Kitchen, and Everything Between
highlight.body: Fresh pasta, baked pizzas, and dishes prepared the way they should be: with time, attention, and the best ingredients. Our kitchen doesn't chase trends. It follows tradition with honesty and consistency.
highlight.imageMidAlt: Glasses raised over the table — a toast in soft light.
highlight.imageRightAlt: Interior of the dining room — table set, calm atmosphere.

highlightFlip.eyebrow: From Our Kitchen to Your Table
highlightFlip.body: Olive oil warming in the pan, herbs chopped fine, and dough resting under a cloth. We cook for neighbours, not for applause — the room should feel like Sunday, even on a Tuesday.
highlightFlip.imageLeftAlt: Hands at work — prep on the marble counter.
highlightFlip.imageMidAlt: Steam rising from a plate — comfort in motion.

splitScreen.ariaLabel: Two full-screen photographs side by side
splitScreen.imageLeftAlt: Restaurant atmosphere — left half of the panoramic view.
splitScreen.imageRightAlt: Table and details — right half of the panoramic view.
splitScreen.captionLeft: An aperitivo to slow things down.
splitScreen.captionRight: Plates to share, flavors that speak for themselves.

0.quote: Truly Italian — warm, honest cooking. We’ll be back soon.
0.name: Guest note

1.quote: Thin, airy pizza with generous toppings — exactly what we hoped for.
1.name: Guest note

2.quote: Very friendly service and a calm atmosphere. We left full and happy.
2.name: Guest note

hero.mediaAlt: Warm dining scene at Trattoria Alesa — the same spirit as our table at home.

split.heading: ABOUT TRATTORIA ALESA
split.body: Italian hospitality in Hochzoll — Trattoria Alesa brings together family recipes, fresh ingredients, and the quiet rhythm of a true trattoria. We honour slow cooking and simple plates: pasta made with care, pizza from the oven, and the small rituals that make dinner feel like home. Between Augsburg and Italy, we keep the table open for neighbours, guests, and anyone who loves honest flavours.
split.imageAlt: Outdoor terrace at Trattoria Alesa — tables set for guests in the sun.

Reservations.title: Reservations
Reservations.body: Send us a WhatsApp with your preferred date, time, and party size. We confirm personally — no forms, no friction.
Reservations.secondary: Prefer to call? Visit our contact page.
Reservations.whatsappPrefill: Hello, I would like to reserve a table.
